metadata.description: Agent AI skill sets — Knowledge (Design Patterns, Refactoring, SOLID, Debugging, Clean Architecture, Testing, API Design, Security, Scrum, Performance, Microservices, Git Workflow, CI/CD, Accessibility, Database Design, Verification Before Completion, Dispatching Parallel Agents, Subagent-Driven Development), Tools (Agentic Rules Writer, Ticket Writer, Agent Creator, Plugin Creator, Brainstorming, Using Virtuoso), Frameworks (Symfony Components, Symfony Upgrade, Django Components, LangChain Components), Playbooks (PHP Upgrade, Composer Dependencies, Finishing Branch), Roles (Product Manager, Architect, Backend Dev, Frontend Dev, QA Engineer, Project Manager, Scrum Master), and Agents (15 specialist and role agents)

plugins.name: knowledge-virtuoso
plugins.description: All knowledge skills — design patterns, refactoring, SOLID, debugging, clean architecture, testing, API design, security, scrum, performance, microservices, git workflow, CI/CD, accessibility, database design, verification before completion, dispatching parallel agents, and subagent-driven development

plugins.name: tool-agentic-rules-writer
plugins.description: Generate a rules file for any AI coding agent. Interactive setup that scans installed skills, asks about workflow preferences, and writes a tailored instruction file for Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot, Gemini, Codex, Cline, OpenCode, Continue, Trae, Roo Code, Amp, and more

plugins.name: tool-ticket-writer
plugins.description: Interactive tool to write tickets of the right type -- story, subtask, issue, bug, epic, or initiative -- each with its own structure, required fields, and quality checks. Runs a type-specific questionnaire and outputs a clean Markdown ticket ready for Jira, Linear, GitHub Issues, or any tracker

plugins.name: tool-agent-creator
plugins.description: Interactive tool to design a well-scoped sub-agent definition -- specialist, role, or team-lead -- with the right frontmatter, tool permissions, isolation, memory, and system prompt. Runs a six-phase design questionnaire and outputs a ready-to-commit agent markdown file

plugins.name: tool-plugin-creator
plugins.description: Interactive tool to scaffold a complete Claude Code plugin -- plugin.json manifest, skills, agents, hooks, MCP servers, LSP servers, and optional marketplace.json catalog entry. Runs a six-phase questionnaire, validates output, writes the full directory structure, and prints local test and install instructions

plugins.name: tool-brainstorming
plugins.description: Interactive pre-implementation design exploration. Turns a vague idea or feature request into a written spec with problem statement, goals, non-goals, constraints, acceptance criteria, and risks. Asks focused questions one at a time, challenges assumptions, and hard-gates implementation until the spec is approved

plugins.name: tool-using-virtuoso
plugins.description: Guided tour and discovery advisor for the code-virtuoso ecosystem. Matches situations to the right skill, agent, or chaining pattern. Covers the six skill categories, the two agent tiers, canonical multi-step chains, and plugin distribution tiers. Use when onboarding to the ecosystem or deciding which skill or agent fits a task

plugins.name: symfony-virtuoso
plugins.description: Symfony framework skills — 38 component references (APIs, patterns, configuration for PHP 8.3+ and Symfony 7.x) and version upgrade guide (deprecation-first approach, recipe updates, bundle compatibility)

plugins.name: django-virtuoso
plugins.description: Django framework skills — 33 component references (APIs, patterns, configuration for Python 3.10+ and Django 6.0) covering models, views, templates, forms, admin, auth, caching, testing, middleware, signals, async, deployment, and more

plugins.name: langchain-virtuoso
plugins.description: LangChain ecosystem skills — 17 component references (models, agents, tools, retrieval, memory, middleware, streaming, multi-agent, LangGraph, Deep Agents, and integrations for Python 3.10+)

plugins.name: playbooks-virtuoso
plugins.description: Operational playbooks — PHP version upgrade (Rector, PHPCompatibility, per-version breaking changes), Composer dependency management (safe update strategies, security auditing, Dependabot/Renovate), and finishing a development branch (pre-push verification, integration strategies, PR messages, cleanup, and recovery)

plugins.name: agents-virtuoso
plugins.description: All 15 agents with their role skills — 8 specialist agents (investigator, implementer, reviewer, refactor-scout, dependency-auditor, doc-writer, migration-planner, test-gap-analyzer) and 7 role agents with matching role skills (product-manager, architect, backend-dev, frontend-dev, qa-engineer, project-manager, scrum-master)

plugins.name: role-product-manager
plugins.description: Product manager role — requirements gathering, PRD writing, prioritization, and acceptance criteria

plugins.name: role-architect
plugins.description: Architect role — system design, component boundaries, API contracts, and ADRs

plugins.name: role-backend-dev
plugins.description: Backend developer role — API implementation, data models, and TDD

plugins.name: role-frontend-dev
plugins.description: Frontend developer role — UI components, accessibility, and state management

plugins.name: role-qa-engineer
plugins.description: QA engineer role — test planning, test design, bug reporting, and release sign-off

plugins.name: role-project-manager
plugins.description: Project manager role — PRINCE2-based delivery planning, risk management, and progress tracking

plugins.name: role-scrum-master
plugins.description: Scrum Master role skill and agent -- sprint facilitation, coaching, impediment resolution, and retrospective techniques

plugins.name: agent-investigator
plugins.description: Investigator agent -- deep-dives into codebases to trace bugs, map dependencies, and surface root causes

plugins.name: agent-implementer
plugins.description: Implementer agent -- writes production code following TDD, clean architecture, and project conventions

plugins.name: agent-reviewer
plugins.description: Reviewer agent -- performs thorough code reviews checking correctness, style, security, and test coverage

plugins.name: agent-refactor-scout
plugins.description: Refactor scout agent -- identifies code smells, duplication, and structural improvements across the codebase

plugins.name: agent-dependency-auditor
plugins.description: Dependency auditor agent -- analyzes project dependencies for security vulnerabilities, outdated packages, and upgrade paths

plugins.name: agent-doc-writer
plugins.description: Doc writer agent -- generates and maintains technical documentation, API docs, and architecture decision records

plugins.name: agent-migration-planner
plugins.description: Migration planner agent -- plans and sequences database migrations, framework upgrades, and data transformations

plugins.name: agent-test-gap-analyzer
plugins.description: Test gap analyzer agent -- identifies untested code paths, missing edge cases, and test coverage improvements
